input.oldString:
<title>Relay Swap</title>
    <meta name="description" content="Swap any token across 85+ chains instantly" />
    <meta name="author" content="VIE" />

    <meta property="og:title" content="Relay Swap" />
    <meta property="og:description" content="Swap any token across 85+ chains instantly" />
    <meta property="og:type" content="website" />

    <meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image" />
    <meta name="twitter:site" content="@vie_xyz" />

    <meta name="fc:miniapp" content='{
      "version": "1",
      "imageUrl": "__IMAGE_URL__",
      "button": {
        "title": "Swap Tokens",
        "action": {
          "type": "launch_miniapp",
          "name": "Relay Swap",
          "url": "__HOME_URL__"
        }
      }
    }' />
input.newString:
<title>GTool</title>
    <meta name="description" content="Swap, bridge and batch swap tokens across 85+ chains" />
    <meta name="author" content="GTool" />

    <meta property="og:title" content="GTool" />
    <meta property="og:description" content="Swap, bridge and batch swap tokens across 85+ chains" />
    <meta property="og:type" content="website" />
    <meta property="og:image" content="https://gtool.vercel.app/favicon.ico" />

    <meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image" />

    <meta name="fc:miniapp" content='{
      "version": "1",
      "imageUrl": "https://gtool.vercel.app/favicon.ico",
      "button": {
        "title": "Open GTool",
        "action": {
          "type": "launch_miniapp",
          "name": "GTool",
          "url": "https://gtool.vercel.app"
        }
      }
    }' />
